title: Show HN: LogClaw – Open-source AI SRE that auto-creates tickets from logs
full_text:
AI SRE · Deployed in Your VPC

Your logs never leave your VPC. 
Our AI SRE watches 24/7.

LogClaw deploys inside your AWS, Azure, or GCP account — monitors your logs around the clock, detects anomalies in real-time, and auto-creates incident tickets with root cause analysis. Your data never crosses a trust boundary.

Logs stay in your VPCSOC 2 Type II readyOpen source · Apache 2.0
